units.content: US Patent Application 2024/0288467 A1 by UT-Battelle LLC / Oak Ridge National Laboratory published 5 September 2024 describes a closed-loop autonomous-experimentation system
patent application constitutes prior art for closed-loop autonomous experimentation
patent application does not include a multi-analyser architecture
patent application does not include an echo-chamber classifier
patent application does not include an ontology disclaimer
multi-analyser architecture, echo-chamber classifier, and ontology disclaimer differentiate present invention from cited patent
